brand_identity.tone: Authority, Clarity, Truth. Objective, rigid, functional.

surface_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Make the grid visible.
surface_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-zinc-200. Hover states border-black. Sharp corners.
surface_and_layout.shadows: No shadows. Use flat contrasting borders for depth.
surface_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-0 for border-collapse). Subgrid for deep nesting. 3 to 4 main columns.

components.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none). High contrast. Primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-zinc-800. Secondary: bg-white text-black border border-zinc-200 hover:border-black.
components.inputs: Shadcn input with rounded-none. 1px border. Focus state must use solid black border or ring.
components.cards: border border-zinc-200 bg-white rounded-none p-6. Use tight paddings for internal data.
components.json_viewer: Specific component for test history. Must use bg-zinc-950, text-zinc-100, font-mono, p-4, overflow-auto, leading-relaxed, tracking-tight. Add a 'Copy JSON' action button.
components.status_badges: Square badges. uppercase, tracking-[0.1em], text-[10px] font-bold. Red for bug, Yellow for in-progress, Blue for queued.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Instant color swaps or sharp border color changes. No soft opacity fades.
interactions_and_motion.focus: Strong, visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-black ring-offset-2) for accessibility.
interactions_and_motion.loading: Terminal-style ASCII loaders or rigid CSS steps animation. No smooth spinners.

icons.usage: Use bold or regular weight. Always match icon size to text line-height.

media_and_images.rules: Avoid decorative images. Function over form. Use imagery only for empty states or raw data placeholders.

empty_state_bg.description: Abstract metallic honeycomb grid for empty states, representing structure and data.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA contrast. All text on background must exceed 4.5:1.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., data-testid='start-exploration-btn', data-testid='bug-list-item'). Format: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a sidebar layout with navigation and a main content area.
Implement Shadcn, but heavily strip rounded corners to match the brutalist tech aesthetic.
The dashboard needs a 'Control Room' feel: dense layout, clear metrics (Total Bugs, Forms Found, URLs Scanned).
Implement a JSON Viewer for test history using the specified monospace font and dark background.
Ensure the URL configuration form is prominent. Use Phosphor Icons for play/stop actions.
Do not use generic Inter font. Apply Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono globally.
